title: Maali Pon Maalai Lyics Udhayam NH4 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie: Udhayam NH4
Singer: Bela Shende & S.P.Charan
Music: GV Prakash Kumar
Lyrics: La. Rajkumar
Other Songs Lyrics
Ora Kannala

Maalai Pon Maalai
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Maali Pon Maalai 
Naam pogindra saalaiyellaam
Magaradham vaan thoovudhey (2)

Madimeedhu unnai vaithu
maarbodu annaipeney
imai moodum iraviniley adiyee

paal veedhi payanamvali
nam thedal nadakudhadi
vinmeengal velichathiley adiye

Nadhimeedhiniley pala kodinilaa
oh neelkirahey kanave

Maali Pon Maalai
Naam pogindra saalaiyellaam
Magaradham vaan thoovudhey

Thozhiley saayum uyarathil
nee irupathu poruthamey
Udhatiley udhadu urasum podhu
uyiriley azhuthamey

Ulnaakiley thaen thuli nee
Un thozhiley kodi malli naan
Sottu sottaai mazhai thuli nee
vettu veli ottrai poo naan

En jannal vaaniley
satendru thirakudhey
.. naduviley
mottondru malarudhey

Maali Pon Maalai
Naam pogindra saalaiyellaam
Magaradham vaan thoovudhey

Oh vialgalil thavalum kopaiyil
nirambum vilayilaa wine ival
Iruliley eriyum meuginai pola
azhagiya oli ival

Kannam serthu kaigal korthu
vatta nilaa vaanam paarthu
ondraagudhey kangal naangu
ottrai kanaa kaanum podhu

Oru poorvai koodathil
nam serndhey vasikalaam
siru vervai pookayil
malar thottam vidhaikalaam

Maali Pon Maalai
Naam pogindra saalaiyellaam
Magaradham vaan thoovudhey

Maali Pon Maalai
Naam pogindra saalaiyellaam
Magaradham vaan thoovudhey (2)

oh neelkirahey kanave

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Maali Pon Maalai expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic journey.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Udhayam NH4, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Bela Shende and S.P. Charan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Maali Pon Maalai was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was this song released?

This song was released on April 4, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maali Pon Maalai, the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody create a romantic atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. As the characters navigate their feelings, the music enhances the emotional depth of their journey. This duet is a testament to the power of love, leaving a lasting impression on anyone who hears it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maali Pon Maalai from Udhayam NH4 is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Bela Shende and S.P. Charan, paired with GV Prakash Kumar's enchanting music, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
When I hold you close, my heart feels like it is in a dream.
The journey on the milk road is where we search for our destiny, shining in the sky.
In the flow of the river, there are many colors, oh blue sky, in my dreams.
The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
In the heights of the evening, your presence is a blessing, bringing life and joy.
You are like honey droplets, I am the flower that blooms in your presence, bringing joy to the world.
My window opens to the sky, revealing a beautiful flower in the middle.
The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
Oh, in the fields, there is a sweet fragrance, like a beautiful light in the darkness.
With eyes meeting and hands joining, we look at the round moon in the sky, feeling united.
In a gathering of memories, we can bloom like flowers in a garden.
The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
When I hold you close, my heart feels like it is in a dream.
The journey on the milk road is where we search for our destiny, shining in the sky.
In the flow of the river, there are many colors, oh blue sky, in my dreams.
The path we are going on is filled with the fragrance of flowers.
